questions.question: What mechanism does TCP use to establish a connection before data transmission?

questions.question: Which layer of the TCP/IP model handles logical addressing and routing?
questions.evidence: The TCP/IP model divides networking responsibilities into four layers: the Application layer provides protocols for specific data communications services...

questions.question: What is HTTP used for?
questions.evidence: Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP) is an application-layer protocol used for transferring hypermedia documents such as HTML.

questions.question: What does the sliding window mechanism in TCP manage?
questions.evidence: TCP uses a sliding window mechanism to manage flow control. The receiver advertises a window size that determines how much data the sender may transmit before receiving an acknowledgment.

questions.question: What does DNS translate?
